title: amaryllis × variabilis
intro: Amaryllis × variabilis, also known as the Amaryllis hybrid or Belladonna Lily, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include sedative, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Amaryllis × variabilis include its ability to treat insomnia, anxiety, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparation of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to relieve symptoms of these conditions.
